description: We provide a formal specification: the kernel generates all denominators d: 1 ≤ d ≤ N, coprime numerators 1 ≤ b < d, computes the continued fraction expansion of b/d, tests max partial quotient ≤ 5, and marks validity; each denominator is guaranteed to appear exactly once during enumeration. Full-range SHA256 checksum given as above.
action_taken: We provide a formal specification: the kernel generates all denominators d: 1 ≤ d ≤ N, coprime numerators 1 ≤ b < d, computes the continued fraction expansion of b/d, tests max partial quotient ≤ 5, and marks validity; each denominator is guaranteed to appear exactly once during enumeration. Full-range SHA256 checksum given as above.
